reason: Brothers McMullen: Brothers at their father’s grave rehash stories that paint wildly different views of him
Four Weddings and a Funeral: Funeral tributes spiral into revealing contradictions about the deceased’s life
Family Thing, A: Siblings clash over their dying mother’s final wishes and competing memories of their past
Safe Passage: Family reunion at mother’s funeral becomes a showcase of buried resentments and conflicting recollections
Ref, The: Christmas counseling session turns into a battlefield of passive-aggressive family narratives
Passion Fish: Close friends at a funeral session contradict each other’s memories of the past
Death in the Garden: Funeral flashbacks reveal each mourner’s self-serving version of events
Legends of the Fall: Family saga at a funeral frames clashing personal recollections
Eat Drink Man Woman: Family dinner transforms into a war of contradictions over shared history
Antonia's Line: Multi-generational funeral gathering erupts in conflicting tales of the family matriarch
